selection_reason: best walk-forward tuple (expectancy_r, profit_factor, -max_drawdown_r, macro_f1, weighted_f1, coverage_ratio) with coverage floor

final_training_report.selection_reason: selected by best walk-forward expectancy/profit factor with macro F1 tie-breaker, subject to coverage floor; training resumes from best compatible history when available

booster.reason: Combined booster stack produced only 8 validation trades, below coverage floor 52; using base LSTM only.

final_training_report.stack_selection_reason: base LSTM selected without booster because no booster candidate satisfied the minimum trade coverage constraint
